pid.executiveSummary: Based on the activity log, the team is driving stability improvements across Backend, Data Science, Frontend, Infrastructure, Workflow. The program focuses on consistent quality, risk reduction, and operational maturity.
pid.problemStatement: Frequent stability work across multiple systems suggests recurring production risk and inconsistent operational readiness.
pid.businessCaseExpectedValue: Reducing incidents and operational friction will decrease support costs, improve uptime, and accelerate delivery cadence.
